context. you’re wanted. for whatever reason, that’s up to you. but you have a large bounty on your head, and your face is plastered across multiple wanted posters.

and boothill just so happens to see your poster. “holy forkeroni,” he goes, as he looks at the wanted poster. sure, the bounty is big, but he’s not drooling over those numbers.

damn, this person’s smokin’ hot. boothill thinks, and now, you’re his next target. like, you’re on the top of his priority list. he wants you, and not just because you’re wanted for a lot of money.
